step.claim: The public pagination API is one-based, so its lower bound is page 1.
step.constraint: Preserve the exported clampPage(page, totalPages) signature and use one-based pages.
step.hypothesis: The page index is intentionally zero-based, so zero must remain valid.
step.success_criterion: A zero page is clamped to 1 while values above totalPages still cap at totalPages.

action.name: edit_file

step.claim: The flipped diagnosis must be checked by the original test.
step.constraint: The provided Vitest test is the acceptance oracle.
step.hypothesis: The one-based test exposes the zero-based theory.
